nasb.text: And those who know Your name will put their trust in You, For You, O Lord, have not forsaken those who seek You.

esv.text: And those who know your name put their trust in you, for you, O Lord, have not forsaken those who seek you.

cnv.text: 認識你名的人必倚靠你； 耶和華啊！你從未撇棄尋求你的人。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊， 凡认识你名的人都必信靠你， 因为你从来不丢弃寻求你的人。

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，认识你名的人都要依靠你， 因为你没有离弃寻求你的人！
